name: Bulgarian Split Squat
setup: Stand lunge-length in front of bench/box
Place top of back foot on bench
Front foot flat, knee aligned with ankle
Hold dumbbells at sides or one in each hand
execution: Front knee travels forward, back knee travels down
Descend until back knee nearly touches floor
Drive through front heel to stand
common_mistakes: Front knee too far forward (past toes excessively)
Back foot too low or too high
advantages: Less spinal loading than barbell squat
